source_excerpt: Services net sales increased 9% or $7.1 billion during 2023 compared to 2022 due to higher net sales across all lines of business.
notes: The dollar amount ($7.1 billion) matches the source, but the percentage growth figure is materially wrong: the claim states 19% while the source clearly states 9%. Per the numeric faithfulness rule, any contradicted material figure renders the claim unsupported.
